components.name: About
components.templateData:
Background

A bit About Me

I'm a full-stack developer based in Galway with a passion for building clean, performant web applications. My journey started at GTI where I graduated with 4 distinctions in Digital Media & Games Development.

I take into consideration performance, accessibility and user experience while writing reusable and efficient code. I enjoy working across the full stack — from crafting polished UIs to designing scalable backend systems.

Currently working at Fidelity Investments, where I contribute to enterprise-grade financial technology solutions serving millions of users. My role involves building scalable Angular applications, collaborating with cross-functional teams, and upholding strict security and compliance standards.

Outside of work I enjoy reading, writing, playing video games and watching UFC & boxing.

My core tools and technologies

components.name: EducationCard
components.templateData:
GTI QQI Level 5

September 2018 to June 2019

Digital Media (Games Development) - Graduated with 4 distinctions. This comprehensive course provided a strong foundation in object-oriented programming, game design, and software development principles. I gained expertise in C#, Unity, design patterns, and collaborative development workflows.

Click Here to see my results

Notable Projects

  • Mod Strength Dashboard - Enterprise Angular app at Fidelity Investments
  • Portfolio Website - Angular 21 with Storybook and Spotify integration
  • Ecosystem Simulation - Unity game using state design patterns
  • Hop Mobile Game - Endless runner built with Unity and C#

Continuous Learning

  • Angular & TypeScript - Advanced patterns and enterprise architecture
  • Node.js & Backend - RESTful APIs, microservices, and databases
  • DevOps & CI/CD - Docker, deployment pipelines, and automation
  • Game Development - Unity, C#, and game design principles

components.name: Qualifications
components.templateData:
Qualifications & References

GTI QQI Level 5

September 2018 to June 2018

This course helped me learn the fundamentals of object oriented programming and was majorly how I was introduced to programming, art and design concepts. In this course I gained great knowledge on how to organise, be productive and work efficiently in a group. I learned a lot about programming which quickly became my hobby, While the design aspect of games development brought me great knowledge on color schemes, drawing and object modelling.

I worked alongside Sean in college & on various personal projects, as a colleague Sean was great at communication & teamwork, he has great efficiency and a fantastic work rate. One of seans best traits is that he has fantastic problem-solving skills. Definitely someone who I would happily work with again.
